profileText: Recent graduate targeting marketing roles. Prefers full-time work, no contract roles, no hourly roles, no sales roles, and no government roles. Experience with campaign support, Canva, and basic Excel. Class of 2024.
jobText: Business Development and Marketing Analyst for a government contractor. Temporary hourly role supporting proposal reporting, pipeline updates, dashboard maintenance, and outreach support. Requires 3+ years of experience. Preferred tools include SQL, Tableau, and Excel. Work involves federal clients and business development coordination.
